top_signals.title: Oil prices rise as Trump warns of ‘very hard’ strikes against Iran
top_signals.summary: President Trump has escalated his threats against the Iranian regime, announcing on social media that the US will hit Iran “very hard” tonight if a peace deal cannot be reached.  In a post on his Truth Social platform, the US President suggested that American forces could take Kharg Island, a crucial oil export artery for [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Dollar Drops the Most in a Month as Trump Says the War Is Ending
top_signals.summary: The dollar fell by the most in more than a month as President Donald Trump’s vow of progress on a deal to end the war with Iran eased demand for the haven.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO Raises $75 Billion in Biggest Debut of All Time
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow and Bailey Lipschultz break down the final developments from SpaceX as the company prepares to go public with a record-breaking IPO on Friday. Elon Musk's aerospace company raised $75 billion in the IPO, pricing 555.6 million shares at $135 each, according to a statement on its website Thursday. When asked about what's driving the interest despite the lack of current profits, Ludlow says that many investors believe that profitable opportunities that SpaceX have set out for the future, including data centers in space, may occur even sooner that the company is predicting.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary:
FreightWaves Today discussed Delfin Midstream new $5 billion offshore liquefied natural gas export platform, Amazon's LTL realities, and surging cargo fraud during Thursday’s live show.

top_signals.title: Real Yield 6/11/2026
top_signals.summary: "Bloomberg Real Yield" highlights the market-moving news you need to know. Today's guests: BNP Head of US Rates Strategy Guneet Dhingra, Parametric SMA Fixed Income Portfolio Manager Nisha Patel, JPMorgan Asset Management CIO of US GFICC Kay Herr, and Bank of America Head of Global FICC Micro Matthew McQueen. (Source: Bloomberg)
